stimulus: sai neg ha du chet tak-sha ras kei ren faz
sai pos lo du abdo war-opa fal kei ren res
sai neu lo du heda grav-pres stan meda unu res
sai mix ma du (thal?abdo) rawa osc li unu non
sai neg ma du difa rawa-ø wav meda unu faz
A negative, high-arousal, medium-intensity tight-sharp rising feeling in the chest, clearly reactive, with a freeze tendency.
A positive, low-arousal, medium-intensity warm-open fading feeling in the abdomen, reactive, with a rest tendency.
A neutral, low-arousal, medium-intensity heavy-pressure static feeling behind the eyes or in the head, source unclear, with a rest tendency.
A mixed-valence, medium-arousal, medium-intensity raw oscillating feeling, uncertain between throat and abdomen, low certainty, no clear action tendency.
A negative, medium-arousal, medium-intensity diffuse raw wave-like feeling with some uncoded remainder, source unclear, with a freeze tendency.
